Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Dude, do you remember anything we did this entire past year?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}I just remember chilling here... That's it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 426}Man, I hate to say this, but... what a waste of time.[n]{f 1 1}
